---
title: "x8_methods analysis"
output: html_document
---

# load data
```{r}
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, here, yaml, brms, cmdstanr, tidybayes)

run_dir_methods = here("16S_sequence_processing", "runs", "methods_2026-03-13")

# read in config files
config_12s = read_yaml(here(run_dir_methods, "12S", "output", "metadata", "config.yml"))
config_16s = read_yaml(here(run_dir_methods, "16S", "output", "metadata", "config.yml"))

data_combined = read.csv(here(run_dir_methods, "12S", "output", paste0(config_12s$run$name, "_08_asv_controlled.csv")))
```

# aggregate by sample
```{r}
# summary stats for samples (ignoring controls)
sample_taxa_count = data_combined %>%
  # drop all controls
  filter(is.na(control_type)) %>%
  group_by(sample_id,
           gene,
           filter_size_um_rz,
           passive_active_rz,
           crispr,
           block,
           extraction_type,
           control_type) %>%
  summarize(
    # number of ASVs (before controls)
    n_asv = sum(detected),
    # number of ASVs (after controls)
    n_asv_controlled = sum(detected_controlled, na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of ASVs classified
    n_asv_controlled_class = sum(detected_controlled & !is.na(taxonomic_rank), na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of ASVs classified as amphibians
    n_asv_controlled_class_amph = sum(detected_controlled & (class == "Amphibia"), na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of ASVs classified as amphibians to the species level
    n_asv_controlled_class_amph_spp = sum(detected_controlled & (class == "Amphibia") & (taxonomic_rank == "species"), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

# pivot longer for plotting
sample_taxa_count_long = sample_taxa_count %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(n_asv,
                        n_asv_controlled,
                        n_asv_controlled_class,
                        n_asv_controlled_class_amph,
                        n_asv_controlled_class_amph_spp),
               names_to = "count_type",
               values_to = "n")

# gene
ggplot(sample_taxa_count_long, aes(x = gene, y = n, color = count_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  ylim(0, 15)

# 16s pore size active passive
ggplot(sample_taxa_count %>%
         filter(gene == "16S"), aes(x = passive_active_rz, y = n_asv_controlled_class_amph_spp, color = filter_size_um_rz)) +
  geom_boxplot()

```

# model fitting
```{r}
set_cmdstan_path(Sys.getenv("cmd_stan_path"))

m1_znb <- brm(
  formula = bf(n_asv ~ gene + filter_size_um_rz + passive_active_rz + crispr + block + extraction_type,
               hu ~ gene + filter_size_um_rz + passive_active_rz + crispr + block + extraction_type,
               shape ~ 1),
  data = sample_taxa_count,
  family = hurdle_negbinomial(),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  seed = 124,
  cores = 4,
  backend = "cmdstanr"
)

```

# model checks
```{r}
model_select = m1_znb

pp_check(model_select,
         type = "dens_overlay",
         prefix = "ppc",
         ndraws = 100) +
  scale_x_log10()
```

# model interpretation
```{r}
summary(model_select)
```

# hypothesis testing
```{r}
newdata_gene = expand_grid(gene = c("12S", "16S")) %>%
  mutate(passive_active_rz = "Active",
         filter_size_um_rz = 5.0,
         crispr = FALSE,
         block = FALSE,
         extraction_type = "Tissue")

epred_gene = epred_draws(model_select,
                         newdata = newdata_gene,
                         re_formula = NA)

ggplot(epred_gene, aes(y = .epred, x = gene)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal()

```
